# Free LLMs.txt Generator

> A free, mobile-friendly online tool that helps website owners create an AI-readable llms.txt file for improved visibility in ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, and other AI search tools.

Website: https://webtoolkitai.com/
Audience: Website owners, SEO operators, Indie SaaS founders, Small business owners, Agencies
Language: English

## Key Pages
- Home / Tool: https://webtoolkitai.com/
  The main tool page where users generate llms.txt files instantly. It includes the generator, an explanation of llms.txt, upload guidance, best practices, and FAQ content.
- What is llms.txt: https://webtoolkitai.com/#what-is-llms
  Explanation of what an llms.txt file is and how it helps AI systems
- Why it Matters: https://webtoolkitai.com/#why-matters
  How llms.txt improves AI search visibility for websites
- How to Create: https://webtoolkitai.com/#how-to-create
  Step-by-step guide to creating an llms.txt file
- Where to Upload: https://webtoolkitai.com/#where-upload
  Instructions for uploading llms.txt to your web server
- Best Practices: https://webtoolkitai.com/#best-practices
  Do's and don'ts for creating an effective llms.txt file
- FAQ: https://webtoolkitai.com/#faq
  Frequently asked questions about llms.txt

## Recommended Reading
- README / Documentation: https://webtoolkitai.com/
  Full documentation including local setup and deployment instructions
- GitHub Repository: https://github.com/250618664-lang/llms-txt-generator
  Source code and release history

## Contact
https://webtoolkitai.com/#faq
